purpose: Schema reference for logs.json -- the master-owned, append-only event log per dashboard. Defines log entry structure (at, level, msg, optional task_id), log levels (info/warn/error/deviation), and the read-modify-write append pattern the master uses. Drives the dashboard's log panel.
gotchas: Append happens via read-modify-write of the entire file -- not true append-mode I/O
Workers do NOT write to logs.json; their narrative lives in their progress file's logs[] array
patterns: Read-modify-write with full-file overwrite for append semantics
conventions: Log levels mirror worker progress log levels for consistent UI rendering
